/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libMy_SHARED_LIB.so -o libMy_SHARED_LIB.so CMakeFiles/My_SHARED_LIB.dir/src/lib/locator_2d.cpp.o CMakeFiles/My_SHARED_LIB.dir/src/lib/coordinator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/My_SHARED_LIB.dir/src/lib/filter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/My_SHARED_LIB.dir/src/lib/points_generator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/My_SHARED_LIB.dir/src/lib/predictor.cpp.o   -L/usr/local/cuda-11.4/lib64  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/cuda-11.4/lib64 libMy_STATIC_LIB.a
